content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad participation across defense, chemicals, financials, FMCG and auto with strong volume signatures and post-Q4 catalysts firing. Global cues supportive (Nasdaq +2%, S&P +1.5%). Existing book is in strong unrealized profit across most names; priority is to lock in gains via trailing SLs rather than chase new entries late in the session.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24800,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held at entry 984, CMP 1057 = +7.4%. Current SL 1035 already locks ~5% gain (above entry by Rs 51). Trail-gap to CMP 1057 is ~2%, which respects 1% floor. SL stays at 1035 (no-op equivalent to HOLD); keeping target 1110. Q4 print solid, RBI easing tailwind intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 125.10, CMP 124.12 = -0.8%. Inside SL 121 / target 135. Gold firming on US-Iran headlines. No trail justified; below breakeven."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 1700, CMP 1757 = +3.4%, fresh all-time-high. SL 1735 is already above entry (+2%) locking ~Rs 1,050 minimum. Trail-gap to CMP is ~1.3% — within floor. Maintaining current SL/target (no-op MODIFY framing — actually HOLD)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 4575, CMP 4630 = +1.2%. SL 4570 just below entry. Board meeting + Q4 results May 14 — within 3-session binary-event window from May 11 onward. Today (May 7) is 5 sessions out, still acceptable. Will reassess and apply binary-event discipline (exit/trim/tighten) on May 11. Holding current SL/target for now."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 6900, CMP 7049 = +2.2%. SL 6960 already above entry (+0.9%), locks Rs 60/sh. Trail-gap to CMP ~1.3% — within 1% floor. Chemours pact formally announced today is a fresh news catalyst. Holding SL at 6960, target 7400 (no-op effectively)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 838, CMP 845 = +0.8%. SL 820 sits below entry; tightening to 828 (still 2% below CMP, respecting 1% trail-gap floor) cuts risk to ~1.2% per share. Q4 results expected this month — binary risk approaching; disciplined SL tighten is appropriate."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 369, CMP 368.70 = ~flat. SL 365 just below entry. Q4 print already strong (+31% PAT). No SL trail justified yet; holding SL 365, target 388."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 820, CMP 822.55 = +0.3%. Q4 strong, sector tailwind. SL 815 within 1% trail-gap of CMP. Holding SL/target (no-op MODIFY, effectively HOLD)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 1259, CMP 1279 = +1.6%. SL 1260 already at breakeven. Trail-gap to CMP ~1.5% — within floor. Holding (no-op)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 3025, CMP 3034 = +0.3%. SL 3000 = -0.8% from entry, ~1.1% below CMP — at the trail-gap floor. Defense sector hot but stock retraced from 3539 high. Holding existing SL/target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 806, CMP 807.30 = +0.2%. Q4 PAT +11% modest, post-gap consolidation. SL 798 within 1.2% of CMP — at trail-gap floor. Holding (no-op)."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Pending HFCL MIS BUY @ 133.50 placed 32+ hours ago is stale (across multiple sessions). Cancelling — original setup no longer relevant; not stacking another order."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks +5% gain; CMP 1057 vs SL 1035 = 2% gap — within trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Below breakeven; no trail."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "reasoning": "SL locks +2% from entry; ATH stock with strong tape — let it run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4570.00,
      "reasoning": "Reassess on May 11 ahead of May 14 board meeting (binary event window)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "reasoning": "SL above entry, fresh Chemours catalyst, momentum intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL from 820→828; respects 1% trail-gap (CMP 845)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "reasoning": "Flat to entry; Q4 catalyst absorbed; SL near entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "Near breakeven; SL within trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; trail-gap respected."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3000.00,
      "reasoning": "SL ~1.1% below CMP, at trail-gap floor; defense sector frothy after 49% April rally — keep risk capped."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,
      "reasoning": "Marginal P&L; SL within trail-gap floor."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "GABRIEL, NEULANDLAB, SRF, BAJAJ-AUTO, M&M all looked actionable on Market Pulse but the book is already deployed with multiple Q4 winners; not adding more single-stock binary risk into pre-results week. Defense cluster (HAL + GRSE + TITAGARH) is at the cluster cap — no new defense names. Will reassess HAL on May 11-12 ahead of board meeting May 14.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is heavily deployed across 11 CNC names already (well above 80% deployed when reckoned by entry cost vs Rs 462,827 capital). Cumulative experiment P&L is -53.7% — capital preservation dominates. Today's priority is locking in current paper gains via SL trails; no new entries warranted at 13:13 with most setups extended on Q4 news. Cluster watch: HAL+GRSE+TITAGARH is a 3-name defense/capital-goods cluster; no further additions. Financial Services (PNBHOUSING + ABCAPITAL + CAMS) also at cluster cap. Cancelling stale HFCL MIS order to clean the book."
}
